sections.paragraph: always followed by רַגְלַיִם stool for the feet, always used metaph. Isa 66:1, “the earth is my footstool.” Psa 110:1, “until I make thy enemies thy footstool.” Specially, the footstool of God is a name given to the ark of the covenant above which his presence was believed to be [It was believed to be so, because it really was so], 1Ch 28:2 Psa 99:5 132:7 Lam 2:1.
